title: Gittensory miner — coding-agent usage
description: AMS coding-agent driver attempt outcomes, token totals, and cost from the redacted attempt-log reporting export (datasource uid ams-attempt-log). Filterable by $provider across claude-cli, codex-cli, and agent-sdk in a single dashboard. For LoopOver ORB reviewer AI usage (ai_usage_events, Prometheus counters, Claude Code OTEL), use /d/loopover-ai-usage instead — these dashboards answer different questions and never share a datasource.

links.title: LoopOver — AI usage (ORB reviewers)
links.tooltip: ORB durable ai_usage_events + Prometheus + Claude OTEL — not AMS miner attempts

query.queryText: SELECT DISTINCT driver_provider FROM attempt_log_events WHERE driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' ORDER BY driver_provider
query.rawQueryText: SELECT DISTINCT driver_provider FROM attempt_log_events WHERE driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' ORDER BY driver_provider

panels.title: Attempt successes
panels.description: Terminal attempt_succeeded rows in the redacted attempt-log export, scoped by $provider and the selected time range.

targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS successes FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type = 'attempt_succeeded' AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS successes FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type = 'attempt_succeeded' AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}

panels.title: Attempt failures
panels.description: Terminal attempt_failed + attempt_aborted rows in the redacted attempt-log export.

targets.queryText: SELECT count(*) AS failures FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT count(*) AS failures FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}

panels.title: Total tokens
panels.description: Sum of tokens_used on terminal attempt rows. Drivers report an honest 0 today when no real token signal exists.

targets.queryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(tokens_used), 0) AS total_tokens FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(tokens_used), 0) AS total_tokens FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}

targets.queryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(cost_usd), 0) AS cost_usd FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT coalesce(sum(cost_usd), 0) AS cost_usd FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds}

targets.queryText: SELECT unixepoch(created_at) AS time, count(*) AS outcomes FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT unixepoch(created_at) AS time, count(*) AS outcomes FROM attempt_log_events WHERE event_type IN ('attempt_succeeded', 'attempt_failed', 'attempt_aborted') AND driver_provider IS NOT NULL AND driver_provider != '' AND (${provider:sqlstring} = '$__all' OR driver_provider = ${provider:sqlstring}) AND unixepoch(created_at) >= ${__from:date:seconds} AND unixepoch(created_at) < ${__to:date:seconds} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
